title: Day 1 Lesson 1 ( Video )Introducing a new student
html:
Day 1 - Lesson 1

しんにゅうせいをしょうかいする = Introducing a new student

ばしょ (Location): がっこう = School

とうじょうじんぶつ (Characters): せんせい (Teacher)、たかはしさん がくせい (Takahashi-san student)、あんなさん しんにゅうせい (Anna-san new student)

The new words you find in this lesson are:

おはようございます (ohayo gozaimas) = good morning

せんせい (sensee) = teacher

しんにゅうせい (shinnyuusee) = new student

こちらは　あんなさんです (kochira wa Anna san des) = This is Anna-san.

さくらだいがく (Sakura daigaku) = Sakura university

がくせい (gaksee) = student

はじめまして (hajimemashite) = nice to meet you

よろしくおねがいします (yoroshiku onegaishimas) = nice to meet you too / please be kind to me
